channel.title: OceanCloud - Microsoft 365 & SharePoint News
channel.description: The latest Microsoft 365 and SharePoint news, roadmap updates, and expert commentary from OceanCloud - Microsoft Solutions Partner.

item.title: OneDrive: New Shortcuts folder option when adding shortcuts
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: OneDrive makes it easy to add shortcuts to the files and folders you use most. Now you can choose to keep those shortcuts neatly together in one place instead of mixed.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Information Protection - Rights Management connector - Certificate-based authentication
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: The Microsoft Rights Management connector is moving from shared-secret authentication to certificate-based authentication, improving its security posture.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - AI Powered Data Loss Prevention Policy Optimizer
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: DLP Policy Optimizer uses AI to analyze your organization's DLP policies, rule structure, and activity signals to identify optimization opportunities.

item.title: Microsoft Teams: New layout when sharing content for Teams events
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft Teams events are getting a new layout when sharing content, improving the presenter and attendee experience for event production.

item.title: Microsoft Teams: Manage Built-in Teams agents in the Teams admin center
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Teams admins will be able to manage built-in Teams agents from the Teams admin center, giving IT more control over tenant agent availability.

item.title: Microsoft Teams: Inline search in compose box
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft Teams is adding inline search in the compose box so users can find and insert relevant content without leaving the message flow.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot suggested rename
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is adding suggested rename support to help users give files and content clearer names based on context.

item.title: SharePoint Showcase: From Chaos to AI-Ready with the SharePoint Admin Agent
item.dc:creator: Microsoft SharePoint Blog
item.description: The SharePoint Admin Agent helps organizations move from content chaos to AI-ready information architecture and governance.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - Unified alert queue
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management is adding a unified alert queue to help investigators review and prioritize alerts more efficiently.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - Expanding note capabilities across alerts & cases
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management is expanding note capabilities across alerts and cases for better investigation context.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - Enhanced user profile in IRM alerts
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management is enhancing the user profile in IRM alerts to give investigators more useful context.

item.title: Outlook: All Accounts view (Unified Inbox) brings your email into a single inbox view
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Outlook is adding an All Accounts view that brings email from multiple accounts into a single unified inbox experience.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Support for MCP Agents with Interactive UI Widgets in Government Clouds
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is adding support for MCP agents with interactive UI widgets in government clouds.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): MCP-Based Agent Enablement for U.S. Government Clouds
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is enabling MCP-based agents for U.S. Government Clouds.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Chat History Filtering by Copilot Experience
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is adding chat history filtering by Copilot experience so users can focus on the conversations that matter.

item.title: Implementing Copilot Cowork for Multi-Team Workflows
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Practical Copilot Cowork rollout guidance for multi-team work, approvals, ownership, reviewer lists, scheduled prompts, and billing guardrails.

item.title: Microsoft Scout Adoption and Governance Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Controlled Microsoft Scout Frontier preview rollout guidance for admin access, Intune deployment, permissions, support, monitoring, and policy language.

item.title: Work IQ APIs and Organization Insights Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Work IQ API planning for Microsoft 365 agents, A2A, MCP, REST access, privacy review, aggregate insights, and Copilot Credits.

item.title: Teams Phone Agents and Custom Voice AI Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Voice-agent planning for Teams Phone extensibility, Copilot Studio, Azure Communication Services, Dynamics 365 Contact Center, and Azure AI Speech.

item.title: Computer-Using Agents and RPA Automation Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Copilot Studio computer-use guidance for managed machines, credentials, supervision, desktop automation, web workflows, and RPA guardrails.

item.title: Fix ExportPkcs8PrivateKey in PowerShell 5.1
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: PowerShell 5.1 and 7 compatible script to generate PFX, CER, and PEM files for Entra app registration, plus delegated vs application API permission guidance for PnP automation.

item.title: SharePoint OTP Retirement: Simple Entra B2B Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Plain-English guide to MC 1243549: legacy SharePoint OTP retirement, Entra B2B invitation redemption, Google identity provider setup, and fallback OTP behavior.

item.title: SharePoint Provisioning Automation: Forms, Approvals, PnP
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Automate SharePoint site creation with request intake, approval, Logic Apps orchestration, PnP PowerShell, logging, and notifications.

item.title: Copilot Agent for SharePoint: Setup, Limits, PAYG
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: 2026 guide to SharePoint agents and custom Copilot agents: setup, PAYG costs, source limits, Copilot Studio, Agent Insights, PowerShell, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Switch SharePoint Classic Calendar to Modern View with PnP PowerShell
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Modernize SharePoint classic calendar lists with PnP PowerShell pre-checks, dry-run support, and post-change validation.

item.title: Restore SharePoint Recycle Bin Items with PnP PowerShell
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Restore SharePoint deleted files and folders from specific folders and dates with PnP PowerShell, CSOM paging, dry-run mode, conflict checks, and CSV logging.

item.title: SharePoint External Sharing: Complete Admin Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Complete SharePoint external sharing guide covering tenant settings, site controls, guest links, Entra B2B, governance, auditing, and PowerShell.

item.title: The Complete Guide to SharePoint Permissions in Microsoft 365
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Master SharePoint permission levels, groups, sharing links, inheritance, and governance best practices. A practical guide for IT admins and site owners managing Microsoft 365.

item.title: SharePoint Permissions Best Practices for Secure Microsoft 365 Sites
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Least privilege, group-based access, external sharing controls, audit methods, and common SharePoint permission mistakes.

item.title: The 10-Step Microsoft 365 Migration Checklist
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: A practical 10-step Microsoft 365 migration checklist covering discovery, tenant setup, identity, pilot testing, cutover, and validation.

item.title: SharePoint vs Microsoft Teams: When to Use Which
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Choose between SharePoint and Teams with a clear comparison table, collaboration guidance, and a simple decision framework.

item.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot: The Complete Business Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Licensing, app capabilities, SharePoint readiness, rollout steps, and adoption measurement before deploying Microsoft 365 Copilot.

item.title: How to Prepare Your SharePoint for Microsoft Copilot
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Audit oversharing, enable Restricted SharePoint Search, apply sensitivity labels, and clean stale content before Copilot rollout.

item.title: Copilot Agents for SharePoint: Setup, Licensing, Cost
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: What SharePoint Copilot agents are, how Copilot Studio powers them, licensing and Copilot Credits work, and real-world use cases for HR, IT helpdesk, and policy lookup.

item.title: How to Build a Modern SharePoint Intranet in 2026
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Plan a modern SharePoint intranet with hub architecture, navigation, news, search, mobile access, governance, and adoption basics.

item.title: 5 Power Automate Flows Every SharePoint Admin Should Build
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Five SharePoint Power Automate workflows for approvals, expiry reminders, onboarding, stale content alerts, and escalation.

item.title: How to Build a SharePoint Approval Workflow with Power Automate
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Configure approval actions, handle responses, send notifications, and update SharePoint item status with Power Automate.

item.title: Power Automate Approval Multiple Approvers
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Build SharePoint approval workflows with multiple approvers using Power Automate. Understand sequential vs parallel approval patterns, how to escalate, and when to use each model.

item.title: 10 SharePoint Automation Ideas Using Power Automate
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: 10 practical SharePoint automation examples built with Power Automate — HR onboarding, contract management, IT requests, compliance alerts, site provisioning, and more.

item.title: Power Automate SharePoint Triggers: Filters, HTTP, Actions
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: A practical guide to SharePoint triggers and actions in Power Automate, including OData filters, file operations, and HTTP requests.

item.title: How to Replace Legacy SharePoint Workflows with Power Automate
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: SharePoint 2010 and 2013 workflow retirement guide — discover which workflows are retiring, how to inventory them, and migrate to Power Automate equivalents step by step.

item.title: Power Apps SharePoint List Canvas App Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Build no-code business apps using Power Apps and SharePoint as a data source. Canvas vs model-driven apps, real-world examples, delegation limits, and publishing options explained.

item.title: 5 Microsoft Teams Automations That Save Hours Every Week
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Five Microsoft Teams automations with Power Automate, from meeting action items to Adaptive Card approvals and weekly digests.

item.title: Microsoft Graph and SharePoint: M365 Integrations for IT Admins
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Graph API, Power Automate HTTP, SharePoint webhooks, Salesforce and ServiceNow integrations, and app identity options for IT admins.

item.title: Best SharePoint Integrations: Teams, Power BI, Salesforce & Dynamics 365
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: How SharePoint integrates with Microsoft Teams, Power BI, Salesforce, ServiceNow, and Dynamics 365 — connector options, implementation patterns, and what each integration delivers.

item.title: PnP PowerShell: Complete Entra App Registration & Certificate Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Step-by-step guide to registering a PnP Entra app — install PowerShell 7.4+, PnP module, create self-signed certs, and connect with -Interactive, -CertificatePath, or -Thumbprint.

item.title: Migrate SharePoint Online Sites with PnP PowerShell: End-to-End Guide
item.dc:creator: OceanCloud
item.description: Migrate SharePoint Online libraries, lists, pages, and permissions with PnP PowerShell scripts, error handling, and validation.
